seoTitle: Set Up HubSpot Outbound Calling: Full Guide
metaDescription: Activate HubSpot's outbound calling feature, register your phone number as Caller ID, verify with OTP, and start dialing contacts from the CRM.
intro: HubSpot's built-in calling tool lets you dial contacts directly from their CRM record instead of switching to a separate phone app. This guide covers activating the calling module in your settings, registering your number as a Caller ID, and verifying ownership through a one-time code. It ends with placing your first live call straight from a contact's timeline.

steps.heading: Open Calling settings
steps.body: Go to your HubSpot account Settings and select General Preferences, then the Calling tab.

steps.heading: Activate Connect Calling
steps.body: Click Connect Calling to enable outbound telephony tools for your account.

steps.heading: Register your phone number
steps.body: Select Add Phone Number and input your country prefix and line number carefully.

steps.heading: Verify with OTP
steps.body: Choose your delivery preference and submit the multi-factor authentication code sent via SMS or voice.

steps.heading: Check your Caller ID and microphone
steps.body: Review your registered Caller ID row and verify your browser's default microphone input.

steps.heading: Place a test call
steps.body: Open a contact record and click the Call component to fire off a live outbound dial.

faq.question: Can I use my personal phone number as Caller ID in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, you can register an existing office or personal mobile number to function as your outbound Caller ID.

faq.question: How does HubSpot verify my phone number?
faq.answer: It sends a one-time passcode via SMS or voice call that you enter to confirm ownership.

faq.question: Do I need a microphone to make outbound calls?
faq.answer: Yes, calls run through your browser, so you'll need to verify your microphone input is working correctly.

faq.question: Can I call contacts directly from their CRM record?
faq.answer: Yes, once calling is set up, you can dial from the Call component on any contact's timeline.
